findings: Depth Guard lint enforces leaf worker frontmatter lacks task/ask_user, and requires several key phrases in worker and commander agent docs.
Checks are primarily substring-based; can false-pass if phrases appear out of context, and can false-fail on minor wording changes.
Forbidden tool checks are narrow ("  - task" and "  - ask_user" only) and may miss YAML variants.
Worker prompt “exact block” is not validated as a block; only two phrases are checked.
No explicit file existence checks; missing agent files fail at read_text() with less clear errors.
